title: Corporate responsibility | About | BAL Immigration Law
content:
## Doing our part to make a difference
We’re committed to helping talent move around the world, and we’re equally committed to making our communities a better place. We are proud of the invaluable contributions of our teammates who give of their own time and talents to causes in which they believe.
BAL is proud to provide pro bono representation through organizations such as the Center for Missing and Exploited Children, Kids in Need of Defense, Human Rights Initiative and Bay Area Legal Aid.

## Explore opportunities for an exceptional career with BAL.
We are actively involved throughout the year in the communities where we live and work. Every BAL office participates in annual Service Days to support local charitable initiatives, providing thousands of hours of service each year.
